name: pingpt-extension
description: Pin individual ChatGPT messages or entire chats. Add custom names and tags, search instantly, and jump back to the original conversation. Features dark mode support and ultra-fast serverless API powered by Hono.

scripts.copy:website-icons: mkdirp website/images && cpx "assets/icons/favicon-*.png" website/images && cpx "assets/icons/favicon.ico" website/images
scripts.copy:icons: npm run copy:extension-icons && npm run copy:website-icons
scripts.build:chrome: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:icons && rimraf build/chrome && mkdirp build/chrome && cpx "extension/common/**" build/chrome && cpx extension/chrome/idb.js build/chrome && cpx extension/chrome/browser.js build/chrome && cpx extension/chrome/manifest.json build/chrome && node scripts/prepend-browser.js chrome build/chrome && node scripts/build-background.js build/chrome && node scripts/replace-browser-text.js chrome build/chrome/popup.html
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:icons && rimraf build/firefox && mkdirp build/firefox && cpx "extension/common/**" build/firefox && cpx extension/firefox/idb.js build/firefox && cpx extension/firefox/browser.js build/firefox && cpx extension/firefox/manifest.json build/firefox && node scripts/prepend-browser.js firefox build/firefox && node scripts/build-background.js build/firefox && node scripts/replace-browser-text.js firefox build/firefox/popup.html
scripts.build:ext: npm run clean && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:firefox
scripts.dev:chrome: npm run build:chrome && shx echo "Load build/chrome in Chrome"
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run build:firefox && shx echo "Load build/firefox in Firefox"
scripts.dev: npm run build && shx echo "Built both Chrome and Firefox versions"
scripts.build:website: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:website-icons
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run pack
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:website && npm run build:ext
